title: Congratulations, {{name}}! You’re eligible to attend the certificate ceremony this year.

desc.eventDetails: By confirming your attendance, you agree to participate in the ceremony rehearsal on February 4, 2026. Failure to attend the rehearsal will disqualify you from the ceremony on February 10, 2026.
desc.ifDecline: If you decline to participate in the ceremony, you are not required to attend the rehearsal on February 4, 2026, and will not be eligible to participate in the ceremony on February 10, 2026.
desc.ifIneligible: If you did not attend the ceremony, you may still receive your certificates at the library later.

pending.text: Are you attending this certificate ceremony?

accept.text: You’ve confirmed <0>to attend</0> the ceremony. If you change your mind, click the button on the right.

decline.text: You’ve confirmed <0>not to attend</0> the ceremony. If you change your mind, click the button on the right.
